signals.headline: ETH Hits $6K Amid Pectra Upgrade Final Testing & Record ETF Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
ETH Hits $6K Amid Pectra Upgrade Final Testing & Record ETF Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ethereum's price has surged to $6,000 as of April 18, 2026, driven by the **Pectra (Prague-Electra) Upgrade** entering its final testing phase, boosting wallet abstraction and validator efficiency, alongside all-time high Spot Ethereum ETF inflows and Layer 2 TVL milestones like Base and Arbitrum.[1]

signals.headline: South Korea's February 2026 CPI: Headline inflation held steady at 2
signals.raw: South Korea's February 2026 CPI: Headline inflation held steady at 2.0% year-on-year, while core inflation rose to 2.3%.**[1] The government's price-stabilization measures kept headline inflation flat despite underlying pressures from rising service prices (up 2.6%) and oil price increases.[1]
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.headline: Forecast update:** Analysts revised South Korea's 2026 full-year CPI forecast upward from 2
signals.raw: Forecast update:** Analysts revised South Korea's 2026 full-year CPI forecast upward from 2.0% to **2.2% year-on-year**, citing oil price movements and Korean won weakness as key drivers.[1]

signals.headline: Central bank stance:** The Bank of Korea is expected to maintain its policy rate at 2
signals.raw:
Central bank stance:** The Bank of Korea is expected to maintain its policy rate at 2.5% throughout 2026, prioritizing domestic demand recovery over inflation concerns, as most price pressures are viewed as supply-side driven.[1]
